name: Suspect Svchost Activity Detected
description: Detects `svchost.exe` being spawned without any command-line arguments. This is highly unusual and can indicate an adversary has launched the process to inject malicious code into its memory space, a common process injection and defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a **`svchost.exe`** process was launched without any command-line arguments. The parent process is **{parent_image}**. This is a strong indicator of a **Process Injection** attempt (**MITRE ATT&CK T1055**), where an adversary is attempting to inject and execute malicious code within a legitimate system process. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched svchost.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
